vision: A simple web-based task manager enabling small teams of 2-10 people to create, assign, and track tasks efficiently.

epics.name: User Authentication
epics.description: Enable secure user access through email/password authentication and password recovery functionality.

stories.title: Login with email and password
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to login with my email and password, so that I can securely access my tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the login page When I enter valid email and password Then I am redirected to the dashboard
Given I am on the login page When I enter invalid credentials Then I see an error message
Given I am logged in When I close the browser and return Then I remain logged in until session expires
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - basic auth required for all other features

stories.title: Reset password via email
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to reset my password via email, so that I can regain access if I forget my credentials.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the login page When I click forgot password and enter my email Then I receive a password reset link
Given I have a valid reset link When I click it and enter a new password Then my password is updated
Given I have an expired reset link When I click it Then I see an error and am prompted to request a new link

stories.title: Logout from the application
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to logout from the application, so that I can secure my account on shared devices.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in When I click the logout button Then I am redirected to the login page
Given I have logged out When I try to access protected pages Then I am redirected to login

epics.name: Task Creation and Management
epics.description: Core task management functionality including creating, editing, and organizing tasks with essential attributes.

stories.title: Create a new task
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to create a task with title, description, and due date, so that I can define work for my team.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the dashboard When I click create task and fill in title, description, due date Then a new task is created with status To Do
Given I am creating a task When I leave the title empty Then I see a validation error
Given I have created a task When I view the task list Then the new task appears

stories.title: Set task priority level
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to set task priority as Low, Medium, or High, so that the team knows which tasks are most important.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a task When I select a priority level Then the task displays that priority
Given a task has no priority set When it is saved Then it defaults to Medium priority

stories.title: Edit existing task details
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to edit task details, so that I can update requirements as they change.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing a task When I click edit and modify fields Then the changes are saved
Given I am editing a task When I click cancel Then changes are discarded

stories.title: Delete a task
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to delete a task, so that I can remove tasks that are no longer needed.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing a task When I click delete and confirm Then the task is removed
Given I click delete When I cancel the confirmation Then the task remains

epics.name: Task Assignment
epics.description: Enable assigning tasks to team members for clear ownership and accountability.

stories.title: Assign task to team member
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to assign a task to a team member, so that there is clear ownership of work.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a task When I select a team member from the assignee dropdown Then the task is assigned to them
Given a task is assigned When the assignee views their tasks Then this task appears in their list
Given I am assigning a task When I view the dropdown Then I see all team members

stories.title: Reassign task to different member
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to reassign a task to a different team member, so that I can balance workload.
acceptance_criteria: Given a task is assigned to someone When I change the assignee Then the task moves to the new assignee's list
Given a task is reassigned When the original assignee views their tasks Then this task no longer appears

stories.title: Unassign task from member
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to unassign a task, so that it returns to an unassigned state for later allocation.
acceptance_criteria: Given a task is assigned When I clear the assignee field Then the task shows as unassigned
Given a task is unassigned When viewing team tasks Then it appears with no assignee

epics.name: Task Status Workflow
epics.description: Track task progress through defined status transitions from creation to completion.

stories.title: Update task status
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to update task status to To Do, In Progress, or Done, so that the team can track progress.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing my assigned task When I change the status Then the new status is saved and displayed
Given a task status is updated When others view the task Then they see the current status
Given I am updating status When I select Done Then the task is marked as complete
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - essential for progress tracking

stories.title: View task status history
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to see when a task status was last changed, so that I can monitor team velocity.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing a task When I look at task details Then I see the last status update timestamp
Given a task status changes When I view the task Then the timestamp reflects the latest change

epics.name: Personal Dashboard
epics.description: Provide team members with a personalized view of their assigned tasks and work.

stories.title: View my assigned tasks
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to view all tasks assigned to me, so that I know what I need to work on.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in When I navigate to My Tasks Then I see only tasks assigned to me
Given I have no assigned tasks When I view My Tasks Then I see an empty state message
Given tasks are assigned to me When I view the list Then tasks are sorted by due date

stories.title: Filter my tasks by status
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to filter my tasks by status, so that I can focus on specific work items.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on My Tasks When I select a status filter Then only tasks with that status appear
Given I have applied a filter When I clear it Then all my tasks are shown

stories.title: Filter my tasks by priority
stories.user_story: As a Team Member, I want to filter my tasks by priority, so that I can focus on high-priority work.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on My Tasks When I select a priority filter Then only tasks with that priority appear
Given I have multiple filters applied When I clear priority filter Then status filter remains active

epics.name: Team Dashboard
epics.description: Provide team leads with visibility across all team tasks for monitoring and coordination.

stories.title: View all team tasks
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to view all tasks across the team, so that I can monitor overall progress.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as Team Lead When I navigate to Team View Then I see all tasks for the team
Given there are tasks from multiple members When I view Team View Then all tasks are displayed with assignee names
Given I am viewing team tasks When I look at the list Then I see status and priority for each task

stories.title: Filter team tasks by status
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to filter team tasks by status, so that I can quickly identify bottlenecks.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on Team View When I select a status filter Then only tasks with that status appear
Given I filter by In Progress When viewing results Then I see all team tasks currently being worked on

stories.title: Filter team tasks by priority
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to filter team tasks by priority, so that I can ensure high-priority items are progressing.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on Team View When I select High priority filter Then only high-priority tasks appear
Given I combine status and priority filters When viewing results Then both filters are applied

stories.title: Filter team tasks by assignee
stories.user_story: As a Team Lead, I want to filter team tasks by assignee, so that I can review individual workloads.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on Team View When I select a team member filter Then only their tasks appear
Given I filter by unassigned When viewing results Then only unassigned tasks appear
